creator: lwhsu@lwhsu.ckefgisc.org
text:
On ¤G,  3 06, 2007 at 22:28:51 +0330, Babak Farrokhi wrote:
> Hello,
> Thanks for the patch. However, this update relies on a few perl modules 
> that are not currently available in ports tree and dependency list 
> should be updated. As soon as I finish porting appropriate modules, I 
> will take care of this patch.

Hello,

Sorry for sending wrong patch. I did not see any new dependency in
CHANGES file (maybe I overlooked it.) I only tested some functions that
I usually use and sent the patch too quickly. Thanks for updating.

-- 
Best Regards,
Li-Wen Hsu
